no: mod_installer: I_C_T variable %BGTEDWINState1% not resolved — ALWAYS block variables not persisted across separate WeiDU invocations. Works with PI or manual install. Tool-specific issue, not a mod bug FIXED: tp2 bug — line 23 has broken ternary: (GAME_IS ~tutu tutu_totsc~ ? 1 : 0) should be (GAME_IS ~tutu tutu_totsc~) ? 1 : 0. Same bug as Valerie (shared codebase). Crashes on reinstall with 'cannot convert is_bgt to integer'. Patched in Extracted and game dir.
sum: Adds Isra, a cavalier paladin, as a joinable NPC in BG1 with thoughtful dialogue, banters, and a romance for male PCs.

co.n: Isra NPC Mod for BG:EE, EET, BGT and TuTu
co.tp2n: Isra NPC Mod for BG:EE, EET, BGT and TuTu

co.no: SKIPPED by WeiDU (exits 0, no log entry) if Gavin is not installed. Requires Gavin NPC mod.
